instruments.name: Bonos de la Republica Argentina en Dolares Estadounidenses al 1% 2029 - Ley Argentina (BONO USD 2029 1% L.A.)
instruments.lawDetail: Ley de la Republica Argentina (Decreto 676/2020 / Ley 27.556)
instruments.currencyOfPaymentEvidence: Denominated in USD with min denomination U$S 1,00 (Decreto 676/2020 Anexo IV); IAMC informe diario column 'Moneda Pago' = USD
instruments.paymentDatesPattern: Semiannual on day 9 of January and July (Jan 9 / Jul 9), interest and principal; first interest payment 2021-07-09 (long first coupon accruing from 2020-09-04).
instruments.dayCount: 30/360 (360-day year of twelve 30-day months, per prospectus and Decreto 676/2020 Anexo IV)
instruments.quoteBasis: BYMA quotes per 100 nominal original face value (VN); prices are dirty (include accrued interest and reflect amortized residual). ARS line = ticker, USD MEP = ticker+'D', USD cable = ticker+'C' (all three confirmed live on data912 /live/arg_bonds 2026-06-10).
instruments.residualValueNote: Per 100 original VN as of 2026-06-10, implied by amortization schedule (installments with date <= 2026-06-10 deducted).
instruments.publishedResidualSource: IAMC/BYMA Informe Diario de Titulos Publicos 09-Jun-2026, column 'VR' (Valor Residual), table 'BONOS GLOBALES - CANJE REESTRUCTURACION DE DEUDA 2020'
sources: research/iamc_titulos_publicos_2026-06-09.pdf (local copy of IAMC Informe Diario Titulos Publicos 09-Jun-2026, table 'BONOS GLOBALES - CANJE REESTRUCTURACION DE DEUDA 2020')

checkedSources: https://servicios.infoleg.gob.ar/infolegInternet/anexos/340000-344999/341150/dec676-4.pdf (fetched 2026-06-10 and read: Anexo IV 'Terminos y Condiciones de los Nuevos Titulos' sections A-D, G; amortization clause, step-up rates and dates, 30/360, first coupon 2021-07-09, denominacion minima U$S 1,00 all verified verbatim)

https://servicios.infoleg.gob.ar/infolegInternet/anexos/340000-344999/341567/dec701.pdf (Decreto 701/2020 anexo - independent primary source not previously cited; same-series NY-law Globales carry identical economics, independently confirming rates/dates/installments per series)

http://servicios.infoleg.gob.ar/infolegInternet/anexos/340000-344999/340826/norma.htm (Ley 27.556 resumen InfoLeg id 340826 - confirms local-law new-bond menu: USD Step Up 2030/2035/2038/2041 L.A. plus 1% 2029 L.A.; no local 2046 bond)

research/iamc_titulos_publicos_2026-06-09.pdf (page 1, table BONOS GLOBALES - CANJE REESTRUCTURACION DE DEUDA 2020, 09-Jun-26: law/issue/maturity/structure/frequency/tasa vigente/VR/cuotas/next payment re-read independently)
verification.notes: Adversarial re-verification 2026-06-10: maturity, coupon step-up schedule (rates and effective dates), amortization schedule (count, dates, percentages incl. rounding-to-final-installment convention), issue date, first coupon 2021-07-09, day count 30/360, min denomination USD 1.00, law, residual value vs IAMC VR and current coupon vs IAMC 'Tasa Cupon Vigente' all independently confirmed. Internal checks: amortization sums to exactly 100.000000; all cash-flow dates are Jan-9/Jul-9 within (issue, maturity]; implied residual as of 2026-06-10 equals published VR. No corrections required.

instruments.name: Bonos de la Republica Argentina en Dolares Estadounidenses Step Up 2030 - Ley Argentina (BONO USD 2030 L.A.)

instruments.name: Bonos de la Republica Argentina en Dolares Estadounidenses Step Up 2038 (BONO USD 2038 L.A.)
instruments.lawDetail: Ley de la Republica Argentina (Decreto 676/2020 / Ley 27.556)
instruments.currencyOfPaymentEvidence: Denominated in USD with min denomination U$S 1,00 (Decreto 676/2020 Anexo IV); IAMC informe diario column 'Moneda Pago' = USD
instruments.paymentDatesPattern: Semiannual on day 9 of January and July (Jan 9 / Jul 9), interest and principal; first interest payment 2021-07-09 (long first coupon accruing from 2020-09-04). Maturity/final payment falls on a January 9 (2038-01-09), unlike the other 2020-exchange bonds which mature on a July 9.
instruments.dayCount: 30/360 (360-day year of twelve 30-day months, per prospectus and Decreto 676/2020 Anexo IV)
instruments.quoteBasis: BYMA quotes per 100 nominal original face value (VN); prices are dirty (include accrued interest and reflect amortized residual). ARS line = ticker, USD MEP = ticker+'D', USD cable = ticker+'C' (all three confirmed live on data912 /live/arg_bonds 2026-06-10).
instruments.residualValueNote: Per 100 original VN as of 2026-06-10, implied by amortization schedule (installments with date <= 2026-06-10 deducted).
instruments.publishedResidualSource: IAMC/BYMA Informe Diario de Titulos Publicos 09-Jun-2026, column 'VR' (Valor Residual), table 'BONOS GLOBALES - CANJE REESTRUCTURACION DE DEUDA 2020'
instrumentNotes: Equal installments = outstanding principal / remaining installments (= 100/N of original face). Per-installment pct rounded to 6 decimals; rounding remainder assigned to final installment, consistent with SEC 424B5 footnote 2 (differences paid at maturity).
sources: research/iamc_titulos_publicos_2026-06-09.pdf (local copy of IAMC Informe Diario Titulos Publicos 09-Jun-2026, table 'BONOS GLOBALES - CANJE REESTRUCTURACION DE DEUDA 2020')

instruments.name: U.S. Dollar Amortizing Step-Up Bonds due 2038 (New USD 2038 Bonds; Global 2038)
instruments.lawDetail: State of New York law (2016 indenture framework, SEC-registered Globales, 2020 exchange)
instruments.currencyOfPaymentEvidence: SEC 424B5: 'pay interest in U.S. dollars semi-annually in arrears' and 'pay principal in U.S. dollars'
instruments.paymentDatesPattern: Semiannual on day 9 of January and July (Jan 9 / Jul 9), interest and principal; first interest payment 2021-07-09 (long first coupon accruing from 2020-09-04). Maturity/final payment falls on a January 9 (2038-01-09), unlike the other 2020-exchange bonds which mature on a July 9.
instruments.dayCount: 30/360 (360-day year of twelve 30-day months, per prospectus and Decreto 676/2020 Anexo IV)
instruments.quoteBasis: BYMA quotes per 100 nominal original face value (VN); prices are dirty (include accrued interest and reflect amortized residual). ARS line = ticker, USD MEP = ticker+'D', USD cable = ticker+'C' (all three confirmed live on data912 /live/arg_bonds 2026-06-10).
instruments.residualValueNote: Per 100 original VN as of 2026-06-10, implied by amortization schedule (installments with date <= 2026-06-10 deducted).
instruments.publishedResidualSource: IAMC/BYMA Informe Diario de Titulos Publicos 09-Jun-2026, column 'VR' (Valor Residual), table 'BONOS GLOBALES - CANJE REESTRUCTURACION DE DEUDA 2020'
instrumentNotes: Equal installments = outstanding principal / remaining installments (= 100/N of original face). Per-installment pct rounded to 6 decimals; rounding remainder assigned to final installment, consistent with SEC 424B5 footnote 2 (differences paid at maturity).
sources: research/iamc_titulos_publicos_2026-06-09.pdf (local copy of IAMC Informe Diario Titulos Publicos 09-Jun-2026, table 'BONOS GLOBALES - CANJE REESTRUCTURACION DE DEUDA 2020')

excluded.reason: Bonar USD fixed-rate 6.0% bullet issued 2026-02-27, monthly coupons, not a 2020-restructuring step-up bond (appears in IAMC globales table and data912 but outside this family's scope).
Bonar USD fixed-rate 6.0% bullet issued 2026-03-31, not a 2020-restructuring bond.
Bonar USD fixed-rate 6.5% bullet issued 2025-12-16 (Tesoro), not a 2020-restructuring bond.
The local-law (ley argentina) 2020 exchange did not issue a 2046 bond; GD46 has no AL twin. Local menu: AL29, AL30, AL35, AE38, AL41 only (Decreto 676/2020 Anexo IV).
Euro-denominated 2020-exchange Globales excluded: family scope is hard-dollar (USD) bonds trading on BYMA.

notes: All 11 instruments issued 2020-09-04 in the sovereign debt restructuring; interest accrues from 2020-09-04 with a long first coupon paid 2021-07-09; all coupon and principal dates are Jan 9 / Jul 9; day count 30/360.

Primary sources fetched and read: SEC 424B5 Amendment No. 2 to Prospectus Supplement (filed Aug 2020, EDGAR accession 0001193125-20-221606) for the NY-law Globales, and Decreto 676/2020 Anexo IV ('Terminos y Condiciones de los Nuevos Titulos', IF-2020-53843620-APN-SSF#MEC, InfoLeg id 341150) for the ley-argentina bonds. Both give identical economics per maturity series for USD bonds.

2030 series (AL30/GD30) amortization is non-uniform: 13 installments, first = 4% (2024-07-09, defined as outstanding/25), remaining 12 = 8% each. All other series amortize in equal semiannual installments of 100/N of original face.

For N=22 (38s), N=28 (41s) and N=44 (GD46) the per-installment pct is a repeating decimal; schedule stores 100/N rounded to 6 decimals with the rounding remainder added to the final installment, consistent with prospectus footnote 2 ('principal payments may be rounded down... difference paid at maturity'). Sum of each schedule = exactly 100.
Residual values computed as of 2026-06-10 match IAMC published VR (2026-06-09 informe) for every bond: 29s=70.0, 30s=72.0, 35s/38s/41s=100.0, GD46=93.1818 (IAMC publishes 93.2 rounded to 1 decimal).
Step-up coupon rates in effect on 2026-06-10: 29s=1.0, 30s=0.75, 35s=4.125, 38s=5.0, 41s=3.5, GD46=4.125 (cross-checked against IAMC 'Tasa Cupon Vigente' column: 1.0/0.8/4.1/5.0/3.5/4.1 rounded).

bonistas.com API descriptions (secondary source) confirm issue/maturity dates and step-up patterns but wrongly label these bonds 'Amortizacion: bullet' - that field was ignored in favor of the prospectus/decree.
Quote basis: BYMA per 100 nominal original VN, dirty prices (paridad x valor tecnico convention per IAMC); the per-bond field quoteBasis records this explicitly.
GD38/AE38 confirmed to share the same Jan 9 / Jul 9 payment months as the rest; their difference is maturity on 2038-01-09 (January) and 22-installment amortization starting 2027-07-09.

Minimum denomination USD 1.00 confirmed in both the SEC prospectus ('minimum denominations of U.S.$1.00 and integral multiples thereof') and Decreto 676/2020 Anexo IV ('Denominacion minima: un dolar estadounidense (U$S 1,00)').
